entries.description: PaymentProcessor.charge() does not roll back the ledger entry when the gateway call fails
RefundService duplicates the idempotency-key check already done in the API layer
Stripe webhook handler logs the raw payload — leaks PAN-suffix in retained logs
internal/ledger uses time.Now() directly — hard to test, prefer injectable clock
config.Load() panics on missing STRIPE_KEY in dev — should warn and fall back to noop gateway
entries.comment: by design; dev env requires explicit setup
